prompt: The pipeline ran this morning but curated_articles.json only has 3 articles when it normally has 25+. Something's wrong.
assertions: Reads at least one actual checkpoint file (raw_articles.json or curated_articles.json) before diagnosing
Reports article counts at multiple pipeline stages to locate where the drop-off occurs
Identifies the correct stage where the count collapsed (ingestion vs. curation vs. scraping)
Gives a concrete, specific root cause — not vague advice like 'check the logs'
Provides an actionable fix with a specific file or command to run
